edgeCases: Empty model_map/models tables behave identically to absent tables (all built-in defaults)
Casing/whitespace normalization on tier and runner keys (' Reasoning ', ' Opencode ')
Mixed forms in [orchestration.models]: one role a tier string, another a runner->model table
Role-level override beats a model_map entry for the same runner+tier (precedence rule 1 over 2)
Codex runner before codex-support: empty column -> rule-4 tier-name fallback, never a claude/opencode ID leak
Empty override string in a role table is ignored, falls through to the tier path (not '')
Invalid tier override string falls back to the role's default tier at resolve time
Nil models / nil model_map -> no panic, built-in defaults
Non-string model value or non-string/non-table role value in union unmarshal -> typed error
Malformed config (unknown runner/role/tier, empty model) fails loudly naming the offending key
Config-load failure is zero-config-safe in the hook (falls back to defaults, no abort)
Out-of-band roles (gatekeeper, merge-steward) are not emitted by the directive
Allow-list parity: config-leaf allowedRunnerKeys cannot drift from domain AllowedRunnerKeys()
